title: HII's Newport News Shipbuilding Hosts Shipyard Update for Elected and Community Leaders
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Newport News Shipbuilding division today hosted a shipyard update briefing for state and local elected officials and community leaders.

title: HII Announces New Chief Information Officer at Mission Technologies
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global all-domain defense provider HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Marc Sosa has been named as chief information officer for its Mission Technologies division. He will report to Chris Soong, HII's executive vice president and chief information officer, and also will have reporting responsibilities to Andy Green, HII's executive vice president and president of Mission Technologies.

title: HII Recognized with Veteran Small Business Advocate of the Year Award
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 28, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) was recently recognized with the Veteran Small Business Advocate of the Year Award from the National Veteran Small Business Coalition (NVSBC). The award specifically focused on the work accomplished by HII's Newport News Shipbuilding division.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Wins Deal to Aid Lionfish SUUV Production
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) is set to provide support equipment and ancillary equipment to aid the production of Lionfish SUUV.

title: All You Need to Know About Huntington Ingalls (HII) Rating Upgrade to Buy
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: National Security Cutter Calhoun (WMSL 759) Sails Away from HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Nov. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The U.S. Coast Guard's newest Legend-class national security cutter, Calhoun (WMSL 759), departed from HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division on Sunday, Nov. 19.

title: Huntington (HII) Clinches Contract to Aid DDG 51 Assault Ships
text: Huntington (HII) is set to offer follow-yard support for Arleigh Burke class (DDG 51) guided missile destroyer program.

title: HII is Awarded Contract for DDG 51-Class Follow Yard Support
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Nov. 17, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Ingalls Shipbuilding division received a cost-plus-award fee contract from the U.S. Navy for follow yard support of the Navy's Arleigh Burke-class (DDG 51) destroyer program.

title: 9 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: Dividend-growing companies provide a steady stream of income and tend to perform better than those that don't increase payouts. The article provides a list of upcoming dividend increases from companies with a consistent history of dividend growth. The table includes data on ex-dividend dates, increase percentages, and streak categories for each company.

title: HII Hosts U.S. State Department Official at Newport News Shipbuilding
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) hosted the U.S. Department of State Under Secretary for Arms Control and International Security at its Newport News Shipbuilding division today.

title: HII Begins Fabrication of Destroyer Thad Cochran (DDG 135)
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Nov. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division started fabrication of the U.S. Navy's newest Arleigh Burke-class (DDG 51) destroyer Thad Cochran (DDG 135) on Monday. The start of fabrication signifies that the shipyard is ready to move forward with the construction of the ship and that the first 100 tons of steel have been cut.

title: HII Celebrates National Apprenticeship Week
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII), America's largest military shipbuilder and provider of all-domain defense solutions, is celebrating National Apprenticeship Week.

title: Nike, Merck Among 13 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In Second Half Of November
text: Investors were rewarded with 10%+ dividend increases from Snap-on Tools and ADP in the first half of November. Other companies that rewarded investors in the first two weeks of the month were Emerson, which extended its dividend growth streak to 67 years, and utilities Atmos and Evergy. The second half of the month will bring dividend increases from Nike, Merck, Hormel and Agilent, among others.

title: HII Recognized as an Exemplary Veteran Employer
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global all-domain defense provider HII (NYSE: HII) was recently awarded the 2023 Honoring Investments in Recruiting and Employing (HIRE) Vets Medallion Award. The HIRE Vets Medallion Award from the U.S. Department of Labor is the only federal-level veterans' employment award that recognizes a company or organization's exemplary commitment to veteran hiring, retention and professional development.

title: HII's Newport News Shipbuilding Opens Additional Site in Norfolk
text: NORFOLK, Va., Nov. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Newport News Shipbuilding division has begun production at an additional campus in Norfolk to support the shipyard's continued progress toward more effective and efficient shipbuilding.

title: HII Mission Technologies Hosts Fourth Annual Global Day of Caring
text: MCLEAN, Va., Nov. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --  HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division hosted its fourth annual Global Day of Caring on Saturday, Nov. 4. More than 400 employees and their family members completed 34 community service projects in Alabama, California, Florida, Hawaii, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey, New Mexico, Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, Texas, Virginia and Washington.

title: Tri-lateral alliance set to address critical AUKUS workforce and skilling opportunities
text: SYDNEY, Australia, Nov. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defense companies HII (NYSE: HII) and Babcock Australasia (Babcock) have joined forces with the University of Adelaide, Curtin University, and the University of NSW to form the AUKUS Workforce Alliance (AWA) — a dedicated partnership committed to preparing a skilled workforce in support of all steps of Australia's optimal pathway to sovereign nuclear-powered submarines under AUKUS Pillar 1.

title: HII's Newport News Shipbuilding Continues Hiring Push with Community Events
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Newport News Shipbuilding division continues to make progress in the area of workforce development acceleration, and is meeting hiring demand for skilled trades positions through community outreach efforts and on-site hiring events.

title: HII Features Platforms, People, Technologies in "Delivering the Advantage" Campaign

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Huntington Ingalls' (HII) Q3 2023 earnings surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 9.1%. The top line also improves 7.2% year over year.

title: Compared to Estimates, Huntington Ingalls (HII) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Huntington Ingalls (HII) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: HII Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) reported third quarter 2023 revenues of $2.8 billion, up 7.2% from the third quarter of 2022, driven primarily by growth at its Mission Technologies and Ingalls Shipbuilding segments.

title: HII Increases Quarterly Dividend to $1.30 per Share
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share, a $0.06 increase over the $1.24 per share dividend paid in each of the prior four quarters. The $1.30 per share dividend will be payable on Dec. 8, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on Nov. 24, 2023.
